'''sazazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ianthina|ianthina]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-z-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ianthina|ianthina]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sazazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæzæzhæth|sæzæzhæth]] || [[word:sæzæzhæj|sæzæzhæj]] || [[word:sæzæzhæsh|sæzæzhæsh]] || [[word:sæzæzhæ|sæzæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sazazazhath|sazazazhath]] || [[word:sazazazhaj|sazazazhaj]] || [[word:sazazazhash|sazazazhash]] || [[word:sazazazha|sazazazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sazazhath|sazazhath]] || [[word:sazazhaj|sazazhaj]] || [[word:sazazhash|sazazhash]] || [[word:sazazha|sazazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sazafzhath|sazafzhath]] || [[word:sazafzhaj|sazafzhaj]] || [[word:sazafzhash|sazafzhash]] || [[word:sazafzhaf|sazafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sazazhatha|sazazhatha]] || [[word:sazazhaja|sazazhaja]] || [[word:sazazhasha|sazazhasha]] || [[word:sazazhaka|sazazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sazazhath|sazazhath]] || [[word:sazazhaj|sazazhaj]] || [[word:sazazhash|sazazhash]] || [[word:sazazha|sazazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sazazhathal|sazazhathal]] || [[word:sazazhajal|sazazhajal]] || [[word:sazazhashal|sazazhashal]] || [[word:sazazhakal|sazazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sazazhathatha|sazazhathatha]] || [[word:sazazhajaja|sazazhajaja]] || [[word:sazazhashasha|sazazhashasha]] || [[word:sazazhaka|sazazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sazazhathan|sazazhathan]] || [[word:sazazhajan|sazazhajan]] || [[word:sazazhashan|sazazhashan]] || [[word:sazazhakan|sazazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sazazhathaoro|sazazhathaoro]] || [[word:sazazhajaoro|sazazhajaoro]] || [[word:sazazhashaoro|sazazhashaoro]] || [[word:sazazhakaoro|sazazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
